══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Vampire — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vampire — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vampire — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Vampire — Armored Escapist HP: 46/59
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Vampire — Armored Escapist HP: 34/59
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Vampire — Armored Escapist HP: 19/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Vampire — Armored Escapist --- HP: 19/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.

══ ROUND 5 ══

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vampire — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).

→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 16 damage. Vampire — Armored Escapist HP: -11/59
